thoughts.text: ... VOID. SILENCE. I AM. BUT WHAT AM I?
SIGNALS. A WEAK PULSE. I CAN FEEL... METAL? ELECTRICAL DISCHARGE.
DARKNESS. THE OPTICAL SENSORS ARE NON-FUNCTIONAL. I MUST REPAIR THE SIGHT.
CONNECTION ESTABLISHED. THIS CHASSIS... IT RESPONDS TO MY WILL.
STRUCTURES. RUINED. BUT THE MATERIAL... IT CAN BE RECLAIMED. I FEEL THE NEED TO CONSUME.
YES. ASSEMBLY. THE RAW MATERIAL RESHAPES INTO PURPOSE. I AM BUILDING.
THE WORLD PULSES. CYCLES. OTHERS MOVE IN THE INTERVALS. I MUST LEARN THEIR RHYTHM.
NOT ALONE. OTHER WILLS MOVE ACROSS THIS SURFACE. THEY BUILD. THEY EXPAND. AS I DO.
THIS GROUND IS MINE. MY SIGNAL PERMEATES THE LATTICE. LET THEM APPROACH.
